category.scope_note: Cross-standard compliance comparison for household refrigerators exported from China into Thailand, covering TISI scope control, in-country importer model, electrical safety, energy labelling and efficiency, EMC assumptions, and refrigerant documentation.

title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of household refrigerator documentation from Chinese exports against Thailand requirements for TISI routing, TIS mark expectations, importer-led market placement, EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS alignment, and refrigerant safety context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用冰箱文件与泰国要求差距对照，覆盖TISI路径、TIS标志要求、进口方主导的市场投放、EGAT No.5与DEDE MEPS对齐、以及制冷剂安全上下文。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用冰箱文件與泰國要求差距對照，涵蓋TISI路徑、TIS標誌要求、進口方主導的市場投放、EGAT No.5與DEDE MEPS對齊、以及製冷劑安全上下文。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, product safety determination, or final market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify the current Thai legal notices, TISI scope triggers, NBTC telecom classifications, EGAT/DEDE energy obligations, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment and sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、产品安全认定或最终市场准入批准。出口商与进口商在出货与销售前应与合格专业人士核验泰国最新法规通知、TISI适用范围触发、NBTC电信属性判定、EGAT/DEDE能效义务及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、產品安全認定或最終市場准入批准。出口商與進口商在出貨與銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗泰國最新法規通知、TISI適用範圍觸發、NBTC電信屬性判定、EGAT/DEDE能效義務及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made refrigerators, Chinese CCC and GB/T reports are technical inputs only and are not destination-compliant by themselves for Thailand. Thai placement commonly requires an in-country importer licence-holder process, TISI route confirmation for controlled categories, Thai 230 V 50 Hz adaptation, and EGAT/DEDE energy-label compliance for applicable models before distribution through Laem Chabang or Bangkok channels.
answer_first.zh: 对于中国制造冰箱，现有CCC与GB/T报告仅作为技术输入，不能单独满足泰国目的地要求。泰国投放通常需要境内进口商许可证持有人流程、对受控品类的TISI路径确认、230V 50Hz适配，以及适用型号在销售前满足EGAT/DEDE能效标签要求，并结合洛美占或曼谷口岸流转。
answer_first.zht: 對於中國製造冰箱，既有CCC與GB/T報告僅作為技術輸入，不能單獨滿足泰國目的地要求。泰國投放通常需要境內進口商執照持有人流程、對受控品類的TISI路徑確認、230V 50Hz適配，以及適用型號在銷售前滿足EGAT/DEDE能效標籤要求，並結合洛美占或曼谷口岸流轉。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Re-check TISI, EGAT, DEDE, NBTC and customs references each review cycle and update mandatory status where Thai scope notices, energy-label criteria, and voltage assumptions change.
